characters.name: Bouncer
characters.description: Abouncerworked at a club thatBret,Jemaine, andDaveattended. He later led the conga line during the song "Too Many Dicks on the Dance Floor." He is played byRandy Jones.

characters.name: BrahBrah
characters.description: "It's Brahbrah. B-R-A-H B-R-A-H"  Brahbrah, played by Kristin Wiig, appears in "Love is a Weapon of Choice."

characters.name: Bret
characters.description: Bretis one of the two members ofFlight of the Conchords. He is portrayed byBret McKenzie. Bret is of medium height and has a short beard and moustache and bushy, curly black hair. He speaks with a heavy New Zealand accent. He plays guitar- both electric and acoustic- piano, synthetsizer, ukelele and household items used for percussion. He is the main vocalist of the fictional version of the band "Flight of the Conchords". He was also a temporary manager of the band (along with Jemaine) when the band decided to fire their usual manager, Murray Hewitt (however, they re-hired Murray later that week). He and Jemaine came to America in 2007, but, lacking green cards, they were deported back to New Zealand in 2009, along with Murray. In his time in America, he also worked as a advertisement sign holder.  Bret also has an affinity forBret's Tshirtsand other very fashionable choices, including hisHair Helmet(which he designed and made himself). He's slightly clumsier than Jemaine. He's gotten his head stuck in a chair, his hand stuck in a jar, and once accidentally driven a car into a pool. He has also kept bumping into things because he thought wearing an eyepatch would make him look cool. Bret is of medium height and has a short beard and moustache and bushy, curly black hair. characters.name: Coco
characters.description: CocowasBret's girlfriend and appeared in three episodes in season one. She was portrayed bySutton Foster. Coco is first introduced in "Bret Gives Up the Dream" and she is seen as a new sign holder, and is paired up with Bret to show her how to hold the signs properly as Bret is held as the most experienced.

characters.name: Dave
characters.description: Dave is a Pawn Shop owner and friend of Bret and Jemaine. He is frequently the source of sage advice on women and dating. Examples of such advice include: "...in America, if you want to spend some time with the ladies, you've got to show them some sausage." "I think you gotta use honesty here. I mean, you know it's always the best policy, like the other day there was five, well maybe it was like four, really hot foreign chicks. They were like Swedish or Korean in my shop and they were like "Dave, we want to have a five way with you". And I just told them "Honestly? Ok". And then I just gave it to them hard, and that's the best way to go. Then after that they're like "Dave, will you marry us?" and I was like "Excuse me, but I don't think monogamy is legal in this country, I dunno where you're from". You gotta try honesty, it works the best."

characters.name: Gary the sheep
characters.description: 'Gary', New Zealand's most famous sheep Gary the sheepis the most popular sheep in all ofNew Zealand. He is mentioned byPrime Minister Brianin the Season Two episode "New Zealand Town". Brian wants to bring him in for the grand opening of the New Zealandtown neighborhood. He appears inMurray's office asPaula, Brian, and Murray discuss the opening ceremony. During the ceremony someone was supposed to mime sheering him, but in accidentally sheered him for real. Gary was also upset that the stall next to him was a BBQ and the chef was cooking lamb. He is seen at the end of the episode, walking across the streets of New Zealandtown.("New Zealand Town")

characters.name: Jemaine
characters.description: Jemaineis a principal character onFlight of the Conchords. He is portrayed byJemaine Clement. Jemaine is tall and has curly black hair and large sideburns. He has black thick rimmed glasses. Creepy and weird, tries too hard with the ladies and comes off as a pick me. NEGATIVE RIZZ. There are homoerotic implications about his relationship with and feelings towards Bret and, again, is kinda weird. Creepy and weird, tries too hard with the ladies and comes off as a pick me. characters.name: Mel
characters.description: Melis a recurring character onFlight of the Conchords. She is portrayed byKristen Schaal. Mel is the biggest and only fan ofFlight of the Conchords. She is featured on most episodes. She has been seen to make sexual passes at bothJemaineandBretin various episodes, and has on at least one occasion hinted that she would love to see Bret and Jermaine get in on with each other. She is married, has medium-length curly hair, and has noticeable "buck" teeth. Mel does things like hang out under Bret and Jemaine's stairs in order to run into them when they leave the house. She bakes them cookies in their likeness and recounts her dreams about them. CueLike in My Dreams. Mel is the biggest and only fan ofFlight of the Conchords. She is featured on most episodes. She has been seen to make sexual passes at bothJemaineandBretin various episodes, and has on at least one occasion hinted that she would love to see Bret and Jermaine get in on with each other. She is married, has medium-length curly hair, and has noticeable "buck" teeth. Mel does things like hang out under Bret and Jemaine's stairs in order to run into them when they leave the house. She bakes them cookies in their likeness and recounts her dreams about them. CueLike in My Dreams. She has an unshakeable crush on Bret despite being married herself.

characters.name: Murray Hewitt
characters.description: Murray Hewittis a recurring character onFlight of the Conchords. He is portrayed byRhys Darby. Murray is the manager of the fictionalFlight of the Conchords. Murray is the Deputy Cultural Attache to the US from New Zealand. He is also the part time manager for the band. The band meetings are held in Murray's office at the New Zealand Travel Bureau which is next door to an Asian massage parlour. Murray takes roll call at the beginning of each meeting and then does a review of the meeting's agenda items. Typically there are two or three in attendance and there are rarely more than two agenda items. More typically there is one. Murray is the manager of the fictionalFlight of the Conchords. Murray is the Deputy Cultural Attache to the US from New Zealand. He is also the part time manager for the band. The band meetings are held in Murray's office at the New Zealand Travel Bureau which is next door to an Asian massage parlour. Murray takes roll call at the beginning of each meeting and then does a review of the meeting's agenda items. Typically there are two or three in attendance and there are rarely more than two agenda items. More typically there is one. Murray always wears a collared shirt and a tie. His best friend is Jim. Murray wants to get Bret and Jemaine into the 'friend realm', up from 'work collegues'.

characters.name: Nigel Seladu
characters.description: "This is Nigel Seladu, from the Internet." It is degrading. Nigel Seladu is a Nigerian man thatMurraycontacted after getting an email as an investment, introduced in "New Cup." Nigel promised Murray his money back with "a thousand percent interest" and "a share of his family fortunes." Jemaine andBretare certain that this is merely ascam.
